series_metadata.series_description: Contains a form used to close risk factor investigations on case reports when no risks can be identified. Confidential pursuant to ORC Sec. 3701.24(C).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 50 years, then destroy ; Microform: Retain for 50 years, then destroy ; Paper: Retain for 50 years, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
